title: MindMirror: A Local-First Multimodal State-Aware Support System for Digital Workers
summary: MindMirror: A Local-First Multimodal State-Aware Support System for Digital Workers
whyItMatters: Digital workers often experience fatigue, anxiety, reduced attention, and task blockage during prolonged computer-based work. Existing productivity tools mainly focus on task completion, while general-purpose AI chatbots require users to formulate clear prompts before receiving useful help.
